AppFunctionAppMetadata.appfn:description: This app provides access to all Android platform Easter eggs. Operational Patterns: - Use 'listEasterEggs' to discover all available Easter eggs with API levels and version names. - Use 'launchEasterEgg' with the apiLevel obtained from 'listEasterEggs' to open a specific egg. Constraints: - Eggs are read-only experiences; this app does not create or modify data.
